response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack software engineer with a strong track record in web development, open-source projects, and software architecture. However, the Principal Performance Architect role specifically requires deep expertise in hardware-software co-design, SoC and IP modeling, and the performance optimization of AI accelerators, none of which are present in his resume. His background does not align with the core hardware and cloud infrastructure requirements of this position.
strengths: Over 12 years of extensive software engineering experience, meeting the baseline years of experience requirement.
Proven ability to design and scale software systems, including low-latency microservices handling high traffic.
Demonstrated leadership and initiative through Staff-level roles, founding an open-source platform, and organizing workshops.
concerns: Complete lack of required experience in SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
No demonstrated background in AI or deep-learning workload optimization, SIMD/MIMD, or GPU architecture.
Experience is heavily skewed towards web, mobile, and full-stack application development rather than cloud hardware infrastructure.
